name: figma-ai-wireframe-agent
description: Minimal JavaScript Figma plugin that generates mobile wireframe screens using a simple planning agent.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['manifest.json','code.js','ui.html','planner.js','agent.js','styles.css','README.md'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)){throw new Error('Missing '+f)}}); console.log('Project structure looks valid.');"
